message:
feat: massive ABI coverage expansion across wchar, unistd, pthread, resolv, socket, and stdlib

Pre-rewrite snapshot preservation: comprehensive ABI layer expansion
with new conformance infrastructure and CVE arena test results.

ABI layer expansion (frankenlibc-abi):
- wchar_abi.rs: +1063 lines of wide character function bindings covering
  wcscmp, wcsncmp, wcslen, wcscpy, wcsncpy, wcscat, wcsncat, wcschr,
  wcsrchr, wcsstr, wcspbrk, wcsspn, wcscspn, wmemcpy, wmemset, and
  full wprintf/wscanf family
- unistd_abi.rs: +862 lines adding fork, exec*, pipe, dup/dup2, chdir,
  getcwd, access, truncate, symlink/readlink, and process group APIs
- pthread_abi.rs: +426 lines extending mutex, condvar, rwlock, barrier,
  and thread attribute bindings with POSIX-compliant error semantics
- resolv_abi.rs: +272 lines for DNS resolver API (res_init, res_query,
  res_search, res_mkquery, dn_expand, dn_comp)
- socket_abi.rs, inet_abi.rs, stdio_abi.rs, stdlib_abi.rs: incremental
  coverage additions for socket options, address conversion, I/O
  buffering, and memory allocation variants

Core implementations (frankenlibc-core):
- string/wide.rs: new wide string utility implementations
- string/wchar.rs, mem.rs, str.rs: extend string operation coverage
- math/mod.rs: additional math function implementations
- pthread/thread.rs: thread creation and management refinements

Test infrastructure:
- New ABI tests: resolv_abi_test.rs, socket_abi_test.rs, wchar_abi_test.rs
- New integration fixture: fixture_nss.c for NSS resolution testing
- Expand runtime math admission gate tests and harness
- Update CVE arena results with new test evidence
- New controller_manifest.v1.json for runtime math orchestration
- Update conformance fixtures (grp_ops, pwd_ops, resolver)
- Update conformance reports and support matrix

Documentation and metadata:
- Update FEATURE_PARITY.md with new ABI coverage percentages
- Update README.md with expanded feature descriptions
- Refresh support_matrix.json with current implementation status
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
